pi_items.source: Task definition - output file location on Android device /sdcard
Web search on flight tracking systems (FlightAware, Flightradar24). AA=American Airlines, UA=United Airlines, DL=Delta Air Lines are standard IATA airline codes for real operating carriers.

Web search confirmed AA 1, UA 1, and DL 1 are all real, currently operating flights: (1) AA 1: New York JFK to Los Angeles LAX, operates daily; (2) UA 1: San Francisco SFO to Singapore SIN, long-haul transpacific route; (3) DL 1: New York JFK to London Heathrow LHR, operates on published schedule.
Task specification defines header as 'Flight,Origin,Destination,Status'. Verifier code (line 74 in verifier.py) confirms expected header matches this specification.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires searching for flight status information for three real, currently-operating flights via the Flight Crew View Android app (com.robert.fcView), which integrates with real FLICA airline scheduling systems used by over 40,000 crews. The three flights are: AA 1 (American Airlines JFK-LAX daily service), UA 1 (United Airlines SFO-Singapore long-haul route), and DL 1 (Delta Air Lines JFK-London Heathrow service). The task examples in the description match real flight routes. The CSV output must contain a header row and data rows with Flight, Origin, Destination, and Status columns.
